creator: tagattie@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 203397
Shar file

Add a new port x11-themes/plata-theme.

Description:
Plata is a Gtk theme based on Material Design Refresh.

Supported Desktop Environments:
* GNOME-Shell     >= 3.20.0
* GNOME-Flashback >= 3.20
* Budgie-Desktop  >= 10.4
* Cinnamon        >= 3.2.0
* XFce4           >= 4.12.2
* LXDE            >= 0.99.1 (Gtk 2.x only)

WWW: https://gitlab.com/tista500/plata-theme
